title: Now Hiring Software Engineer at BSNL Advisory Limited

jsonLd.title: Now Hiring Software Engineer at BSNL Advisory Limited
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at BSNL Advisory Limited. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Software Engineer to strengthen our Thane-based team.

About BSNL Advisory Limited:
BSNL Advisory Limited is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in Git
• Proficiency in Machine Learning
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in TensorFlow
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in Go

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Referral bonus program
• Life and accident insurance
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Thane, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with BSNL Advisory Limited!
